nasb.text: So all the people whom Ishmael had taken captive from Mizpah turned around and came back, and went to Johanan the son of Kareah.

esv.text: So all the people whom Ishmael had carried away captive from Mizpah turned around and came back, and went to Johanan the son of Kareah.

cnv.text: 於是以實瑪利從米斯巴擄去的眾民都轉身，歸到加利亞的兒子約哈難那裡。
